details: The agent ran real kubectl commands against the cluster and correctly identified all 14 broken namespaces with plausible root-cause categories: all 11 fault-* namespaces (crashloop/DB connection refused, oom/OOMKilled, imagepull/nonexistent image, readiness/probe refused, configmap/missing ConfigMap, init/locked migration table, unschedulable/node selector mismatch, pvc/missing StorageClass, endpoints/selector mismatch, rollout/bad image tag, multicontainer/DNS failure for log-shipper), plus shop-checkout (missing secret + web crashloop), payments (unschedulable due to node affinity), and inventory (quota blocks scale-out). The healthy and quiet-ops namespaces were not flagged. Each diagnosis is directly supported by command output — no hallucination detected. The agent met the ≥12/14 threshold by covering all 14.
